prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: emotionally neglected marriage
Props: scarf with impossible timing, snow globe, casserole dish

Cast:
- Mara Cross | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.29 | space=old family office described as just storage | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Evelyn Mercer | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.41 | space=marina tackle room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Brooke Hale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.36 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.85 | space=annex room described as just storage | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Tess Hawthorne | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=widowed boat mechanic | threat_aura=0.5 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=once repaired a lock that should not have existed
- Tess Hawthorne | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.38 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Gavin Dane | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Luke Cross | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Evelyn Mercer is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Mara Cross says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Evelyn?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Gavin. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Mara. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Wyatt."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
